---
applyTo: "**/*.{tsx,jsx,ts,js,vue,svelte,css,scss,html}"
---

# Frontend Instructions

- Preserve existing UI patterns and design tokens.
- Avoid broad rewrites for narrow UI fixes.
- Keep accessibility in mind: labels, keyboard behavior, focus states, and
  contrast.
- Do not remove existing analytics, auth, or feature-flag checks unless asked.
- Validate with targeted build, lint, or UI tests when available.
- Avoid editing generated bundles unless they are the source of truth for this
  project.
